Introduction.title: Spread your dreams of studying abroad with HCM-MIRAI
Introduction.subtitle: Who We Are
Introduction.mission: HCM-MIRAI Study Abroad, along with a leading network of educational partners, is one of the reputable and long-standing consulting and training units in Vietnam. With the mission of "Dedication - Professionalism - Transparency", we have been the bridge helping thousands of students conquer international knowledge.
Introduction.desc1: We are not just a consulting center, but also a reliable companion, helping you prepare all necessary baggage from language, life skills to complex legal procedures.
Introduction.desc2: With 19 years of training experience and a network of over 200 partner universities in Japan, Korea, Australia, we are committed to bringing the safest and most effective learning path.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Connecting knowledge, shaping the future, and helping Vietnam's young generation access international educational excellence.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To become a leading study abroad consultant and language training provider, the #1 choice for students and parents.

core_values.title: Core Values
core_values.desc: Dedicated in consultation - Professional in process - Transparent in costs.

philosophy.title: Educational Philosophy
philosophy.desc: Learner-centered education, teaching not only language but also life skills and a global mindset.

benefits.title: Why Choose HCM-MIRAI for Your Study Abroad Journey?

item1.title: 19 Years of Experience
item1.desc: Nearly two decades of experience establishing our brand and reputation in education.

item2.title: Strategic Partners
item2.desc: Direct links with over 200 prestigious Universities and Colleges in Japan, Korea, and Australia.

item3.title: High Visa Success Rate
item3.desc: Professional document preparation support, maintaining a visa success rate above 98%.

item4.title: Transparent Pricing
item4.desc: Commitment to no hidden costs beyond the contract, with clear financial roadmaps from the start.
